summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEW Hungarian CRM category management features. All 3 new features successfully implemented and working: 1) Category editing (PUT /api/categories/{id}) with modal interface, 2) Dashboard category statistics (GET /api/categories/stats) with pie charts and bar charts using recharts, 3) Drag & drop category sorting (PUT /api/categories/reorder) using @hello-pangea/dnd library.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loading - Complete with statistics and charts
Dashboard statistics cards - All 4 cards displaying (workers, projects, categories, recent activity)
Dashboard category distribution pie chart - Rendering with recharts library
Dashboard recent activity bar chart - Rendering with recharts library and no-data message
Settings page access - Loads correctly for admin users
Categories tab in settings - Accessible and functional
Category editing modal - Opens with pencil button, allows name/color changes
Category color modification - Color picker and presets working
Drag & drop category reordering - @hello-pangea/dnd implementation working
Category statistics API - GET /api/categories/stats returning correct data
New category creation - Form working with validation
Backend APIs - All 13 tests passed including new endpoints
Hungarian language interface - All text displaying correctly
Frontend-backend integration - Statistics updating correctly after changes

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 13 API tests passed including 3 new endpoints
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components working, dashboard charts rendering, category management functional
